level_signals: Single-threaded leader across Tribes and Alliances
Comp range $200K-$250K base consistent with Staff-level in NYC
Scope spans entire customer lifecycle across multiple markets

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 6+ years of PM experience (Senior/Staff level) with a proven track record of architecting and scaling personalization engines or recommendation systems that move the needle for millions of users across multiple markets.
proven track record of architecting and scaling personalization engines or recommendation systems that move the needle for millions of users across multiple markets.

A deep-seated ability to partner with Data Science and ML Engineering teams; you are as comfortable discussing model performance, feature engineering, and causal inference as you are defining a product vision.

A sophisticated understanding of subscription economics—specifically how pricing dynamics, promotional logic, and personalized offers impact LTV and churn—allowing you to balance business growth with user value.

Own the vision and roadmap for benefit optimization across the entire customer lifecycle—evolving from basic segmentation to ML-powered systems that deliver the right offer to each customer at the right moment.
Drive cross-functional alignment as a single-threaded leader across Tribes and Alliances—connecting Commercial, Marketing, CRM, and Growth teams around a unified benefit strategy.

Define success metrics that balance customer outcomes (satisfaction, retention, engagement) with business goals (conversion, LTV, discount efficiency)—measuring what matters for both customers and the company.
Interacting with front-end developers, designers, product managers and our teams around the world is very much part of our day-to-day, so communication skills are vital.

scope.team_size_estimate: squad of Data Scientists and ML Engineers (size not specified)
scope.surface: Benefit Optimization platform — ML-powered personalized offers and recommendations across the full customer lifecycle (acquisition, retention, reacquisition)
core_responsibilities: Own the vision and roadmap for benefit optimization across the entire customer lifecycle
Scale decision making on benefits across all markets and touchpoints
Partner with data science to build ML models that predict what customers value
Define success metrics that balance customer outcomes with business goals
Drive cross-functional alignment as a single-threaded leader across Tribes and Alliances

compensation.equity_form: company equity plan based on role

green_flags: Compensation range disclosed and competitive ($200K-$250K base for NYC)
Clear product surface and ownership area (Benefit Optimization platform)
Equity plan mentioned as part of compensation
Explicit customer-centric and ethical AI philosophy stated in the role
Generous PTO, sabbatical, and up to 16 weeks parental leave
Comprehensive health benefits effective day one at $0 monthly option
red_flags: No explicit mention of visa sponsorship or work authorization — unclear for international candidates
Location type is not explicitly stated (onsite vs. hybrid vs. remote) in the JD body; pay range label says 'New York' suggesting NYC-based role
No nice-to-haves listed — makes it harder to assess flexibility in candidate requirements
Squad leadership scope (Data Scientists + ML Engineers) without explicit people management framing — reporting structure ambiguous
